_comment: MCP server config for VERITAS. Copy to mcp_servers.json and edit.

_setup.sat: Run: bash scripts/setup_sat.sh — it writes the resolved 'sat' block into mcp_servers.json with detected absolute paths (no env vars needed).

_paths.info: You can either (a) put absolute paths directly into the values below, or (b) keep ${VAR} placeholders and export those vars before launching VERITAS.
vars_used_below: SAT_PYTHON          — path to Python in your SAT conda env (e.g. /home/you/.conda/envs/sat/bin/python)
SAT_REPO_PATH       — path to the cloned SAT repository (e.g. /home/you/SAT)
BIO_DATA_ROOT       — root directory containing your imaging datasets (e.g. /data/medical)

servers.name: code_execution
servers._description: Sandboxed Python execution for statistical analysis (Phase 2B). Required for all VERITAS runs.

servers.name: sat
servers._description: SAT medical-image segmentation (Phase 2A). Optional — only needed for runs on raw imaging datasets.
